texto: I do have the most adorable little Chihuahua mix. I adopted him about 3 1/2 years ago from Much Love pet adoption, and he has been the love of my life ever since. His name is Beau, or as my sister and I like to call him ' mushy mush' because he truly is just a pile of loving mush that just melts in your arms.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Torrey DeVitto: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “I do have the most adorable little Chihuahua mix. I adopted him about 3 1/2 years ago from Much L…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que vida, love, sister pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de vida e sister.
